zh.lifeSummary: 當Marquard Langenmantel於1210年出生在德國貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格時，他的父親Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren III30歲，母親Mechtild Lauginger10歲。他於1235年之前與Elisabeth N結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1288年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marquard Langenmantel于1210年出生在德国貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格时，他的父亲Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren III30岁，母亲Mechtild Lauginger10岁。他于1235年之前与Elisabeth N结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1288年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Marquard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Markwardt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Gerhardt.

North German: occupational name for a frontier guard or the guardian of a fenced-off area (such as a woodland), Middle Low German markward, from mark ‘boundary’ + ward(e) ‘guardian’. In medieval folk stories Markwart occurs as a nickname for a jay; it is possible that this use may have influenced the acquisition of the surname in some cases.
German: from the personal name Markward(t), composed of the elements mark ‘boundary’ + ward ‘guardian’. Compare Marquardt .

en.lifeSummary: When Marquard Langenmantel was born in 1210, in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren III, was 30 and his mother, Mechtild Lauginger, was 10. He married Elisabeth N before 1235. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 1288.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marquard Langenmantel est né en 1210, à Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mechtild Lauginger, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth N avant 1235. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1288.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marquard Langenmantel 1210 in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren III 30 und seine Mutter Mechtild Lauginger 10. Er hat vor 1235 Elisabeth N geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1288.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marquard Langenmantel è nato il nel 1210 nel Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren III, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mechtild Lauginger, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth N prima del 1235. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1288.

ja.lifeSummary: Marquard Langenmantelが1210年にドイツバイエルンアウグスブルグアウグスブルグで生まれた時，父Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren IIIは30歳，母Mechtild Laugingerは10歳であった。1235年以前にElisabeth Nと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1288年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marquard Langenmantel(이)가 1210년 독일 베이른 오그스버그 오그스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren III(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mechtild Lauginger(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1235년 이전 Elisabeth N(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1288년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marquard Langenmantel nasceu em 1210, em Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mechtild Lauginger, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth N antes 1235. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1288.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marquard Langenmantel родился в 1210 г. в местности аугсбург, аугсбург, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechtild Lauginger, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth N перед 1235 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1288 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marquard Langenmantel nació en 1210, en Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren III, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mechtild Lauginger, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Elisabeth N antes de 1235. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1288.
